title: Green Color Scheme Concept
description: The application's global UI/UX aesthetic shall employ a green-centric color scheme to convey a sense of financial growth, freshness, and balance.
acceptance_criteria: The primary brand color is a shade of green.
The color palette ensures sufficient contrast for readability (WCAG AA compliant).
Positive financial indicators (e.g., income) align intuitively with the green theme without conflicting with semantic colored indicators.
